title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: Satellite 6.17.6.2 Async Update
overview: An update for Satellite is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Red Hat Satellite is a system management solution that allows organizationsto configure and maintain their systems without the necessity to providepublic Internet access to their servers or other client systems. Itperforms provisioning and configuration management of predefined standardoperating environments.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: Can't register systems with bond interface named bond-<something> AND a tagged vlan on the same interface
EOL banner has broken link to Red Hat Satellite Upgrade Helper
redhat.satellite.content_upload requires rpm module for python 3.12
Content View Filter Errata: error when searching by date
When booting using FDI (Foreman Discovery Image) version 5.0.1-22, it's failing
Repetitive recalculation of Katello::RepositoryTypeManager.enabled_repository_types makes katello:correct_repositories very slow []

full_text:
An update for Satellite is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Satellite is a system management solution that allows organizationsto configure and maintain their systems without the necessity to providepublic Internet access to their servers or other client systems. Itperforms provisioning and configuration management of predefined standardoperating environments.
